name: chr22p_acrocentric_short_arm
description: Chromosome 22 short arm (22p), an acrocentric short arm composed of alpha-satellite, beta-satellite, 45S rDNA NOR and gamma-satellite-like sequences. Mostly unassembled in GRCh38; resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Acrocentric short-arm architecture shared with chr13/14/15/21; alpha-sat -> beta-sat -> NOR -> stalk.
